+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! AGXCLChannelSKSM::submitBuffer: context_id is out of range (%u)\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! Could not retain UMA fList for valid UMA Pool in %s\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! OOB idx: %d\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! getGuiltyChannel: Type confusion - invalid AGXChannel for firmware guilty_stamp_index %d\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! growable array is not empty at destruction\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! handleChannelErrorEvent: Type confusion - invalid AGXChannel for firmware stamp_idx %u\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! q->getFreeEntries() < AGXK_MAX_KSM_KICK_QUEUE_ENTRIES_PER_CMD\n"
+ "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! queueing too many unmaps (possbile failure to commit)!\n"
+ "CS RIF Perf Regs"
+ "Event ID %u signal value (%llu) will use fallback path since queue is idle"
+ "Failed to map fKSMKickQueueSharedState\n"

- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (((uint64_t)~AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_ASID_CLRMSK >> AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_ASID_SHIFT) & (uint64_t)(taskId)) == (uint64_t)(taskId)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (((uint64_t)~AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_OUTPUTADDR_CLRMSK >> AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_OUTPUTADDR_SHIFT) & (uint64_t)((ttba0_phys >> (14U)))) == (uint64_t)((ttba0_phys >> (14U)))\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (((uint64_t)~AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_OUTPUTADDR_CLRMSK >> AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_OUTPUTADDR_SHIFT) & (uint64_t)((ttba1_phys >> (14U)))) == (uint64_t)((ttba1_phys >> (14U)))\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGPTBATPtr[gptbat_idx] & AGXUAT_TTBA_WORD0_VALID_EN_V) == 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageCataloguePtr)[i] == (fGartTables[0].encodedDummyPCE)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryDescs)[i] == (nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryPtrs)[i] == (fGartTables[0].fDummyPageDirectoryPtr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableDescs)[i] == (nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableDescs[pc_index])[i] == (nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs)[i] == (fGartTables[0].fDummyPageTablePtrs)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index] != nullptr) == (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableDescs[pc_index]!= nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index] != nullptr) == (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableRefCount[pc_index]!= nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index])[i] == (fGartTables[0].fDummyPTPtr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index])[i] == (nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index][pd_index])[i] == (fGartTables[0].encodedDummyPTE)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableRefCount)[i] == (0)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableRefCount[pc_index])[i] == (0)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (options & (kUATMapFWDeviceMem | kUATMapFWUncached)) != (kUATMapFWDeviceMem | kUATMapFWUncached)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (options & ~kUATValidOptionsMask) == 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! (physAddr & AGXUAT_L3_WORD0_OUTPUTADDR_CLRMSK) == 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! AGXCLChannelSKSM::submitBuffer: context_id is out of range (%d)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! OSDynamicCast(AGXAccelerator, driverService)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! UMA PP desc index out of bounds: %d\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! Unable to create shared page directory or page table descriptor\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fCodeRangeAllocator\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[0].fDummyPageTablePtrs == fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index]\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[1].fDummyPTPtr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[1].fDummyPageDirectoryPtr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[1].fDummyPagePtr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageCatalogueDesc != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageCataloguePtr != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageCataloguePtr[pc_index] & AGXUAT_L1_WORD0_VALID_EN\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryDescs != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryPtrs != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryPtrs[pc_index] != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryPtrs[pc_index]!=nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryPtrs[pc_index][pd_index] & AGXUAT_L2_WORD0_VALID_EN\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageDirectoryRefCount[pc_index] > 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableDescs[pc_index]\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index]\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index] != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index]!=nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index][pd_index] != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index][pd_index]!=nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index][pd_index][pt_index] & AGXUAT_L3_WORD0_VALID_EN\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTablePtrs[pc_index][pd_index][pt_index] == fGartTables[0].encodedDummyPTEfailed: virt:%010llX [0x%llx][0x%llx][0x%llx]=0x%llX new: 0x%llX\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableRefCount[pc_index][pd_index] > 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fUnmapQueueCount < AGXUAT_UNMAP_QUEUE_SIZE\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fUnmapQueueCount == 0\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! fUnmapQueue[i].desc\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isAlignedToPOT(aligned_segment_length, (uint32_t)cached_page_size)failed: %u/%u\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isAlignedToPOT(base_virtual_address, (uint32_t)cached_page_size)failed: 0x%llX/%u\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isAlignedToPOT(page_virtual_address, (uint32_t)cached_page_size)failed: 0x%llX/%u\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isAlignedToPOT(physical_address, (uint32_t)cached_page_size)failed: 0x%llX/%u\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isAlignedToPOT(virtual_length, (uint32_t)cached_page_size)failed: %llu/%u\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! isKernelGart() || !isKernelGart() && (fGartTables[1].fPageCatalogueDesc != nullptr)\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! kernel_gart_tables\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! nullptr == fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableDescs[pc_index]\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! nullptr == fGartTables[ttbr_index].fPageTableRefCount[pc_index]\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_directory_desc->getRetainCount() == 1\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_directory_ptr != nullptr && page_directory_desc != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_directory_ptr!=nullptr && page_directory_desc!=nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_directory_ptr[pd_index] & AGXUAT_L2_WORD0_VALID_EN\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_table_desc->getRetainCount() == 1\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_table_ptr != nullptr && page_table_desc != nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! page_table_ptr!=nullptr && page_table_desc!=nullptr\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! ttbrIdx < 2\n"
- "AGXk: %s:%d:%s: !!! uat_config\n"
